Value: Effects of magnesium hydroxide in renal stone disease

Value: 6 patients failed to return for follow-up

Data Field: Data Requires Imputation for SD? (Yes / No / Not sure)

Value: Non-randomized study. Control group consisted of patients whose stone disease was either not active enough for prophylactic treatment or who preferred to delay medical treatment.
